item.title: Amazon is selling a 'fast' Android 16 tablet for only $81
item.description: One buyer says, "I was impressed by how smooth the system runs."

item.title: T-Mobile CEO plans major changes after more phone customers flee
item.description: T-Mobile’s CEO is taking drastic action to boost customer loyalty after continued losses.

item.title: Bank of America resets Nvidia stock forecast
item.description: Nvidia (NVDA) stock has gained about 32% over the past year, at the time of writing, Tuesday afternoon, Feb. 17, according to Yahoo Finance. Meanwhile...

item.title: Amazon is selling a 'light and fluffy' 7-piece bedding set for just $23
item.description: Get this all-season bedding set for half off right now.

item.title: Wall Street’s rotation strategy: Which sectors are winning now
